title: EDI@Energy MIG Profile
description: Message Implementation Guide profile for one (message_type, release) pair.

schema_version.description: Schema version number. Current maximum supported version is 1. Versions higher than the codegen constant MAX_SCHEMA_VERSION in xtask/src/codegen.rs are rejected with a helpful error. Bump this field when structural (breaking) schema changes are introduced; additive-only changes (new optional fields with defaults) do not require a version bump.

pid_source.description: Where the Prüfidentifikator is located in this message type. 'bgm_de1004' (default): BGM element 1 (DE 1004). 'rff_z13': top-level RFF segment with qualifier Z13.

valid_from.description: First date on which this profile is normatively valid (BDEW 'Gültig ab'). Should match the fvYYYYMMDD component of the profile directory name. Added in F-020 to make the date self-describing and independently verifiable.

valid_until.description: Last date on which this profile is normatively valid (BDEW 'Gültig bis'). Absent means open-ended.

ahb_revision.description: AHB revision letter for same-wire-code correction tracking. May differ from the wire release code when BDEW issues an AHB correction without a MIG change.

source_document.description: BDEW document title this profile was derived from, including revision date.

supersedes_directory.description: Directory name of the earlier same-wire-code profile that this profile supersedes. Required when two directories share the same wire release code (AHB correction cycle).

ordering_hint.description: Optional explicit segment-tag ordering for segment-order validation. When absent, ordering is derived automatically.

archived.description: When true, this profile is excluded from the default build and requires the `{message_type}-archive` or `archive` Cargo feature to compile. Set by `cargo xtask codegen --prune-expired` when the profile's valid_until date is more than GRACE_DAYS in the past. This is an explicit, deterministic marker that persists in the JSON file so codegen output is reproducible regardless of when it is run.

pid_exempt.description: When true, this profile intentionally has no Prüfidentifikatoren and AHB rule-coverage warnings are suppressed. Use for message types whose BDEW AHB does not assign business-level PIDs (e.g. CONTRL — a pure EDIFACT functional acknowledgment without BDEW process codes).

segments.description: Flat list of segment definitions at the message level.

segment_groups.description: Top-level segment groups; groups may be nested via 'groups'.

Status.description: M = mandatory, C = conditional, R = recommended (used in some BDEW profiles).

Requirement.description: M = mandatory, C = conditional, O = optional, N = not used.

QualifierMap.description: Map from DE identifier to list of allowed qualifier values.

min_occurrences.description: Minimum number of times this group must appear. When absent, defaults to 1 for mandatory groups and 0 for optional groups (F-006).
